system.description: A powered exoskeleton grows over and through your body, rendering you an armoured fighting machine capable of feats of supernatural strength and resilience.

upgrades.name: Energy Gun
upgrades.description: You have a built-in gun. Pick one Gun upgrade. You cannot add further upgrades.

upgrades.name: Energy Weapon
upgrades.description: You have a built in energy weapon. Pick one Energy Weapon upgrade. You cannot add further upgrades.

upgrades.name: Sensory Array
upgrades.description: Your senses expand into a generalised radar in the locale, and you can see through obstacles.

upgrades.name: Reactor
upgrades.description: You have a reactor in your exoskeleton. When activated, it gains three charges used in the place of Fair Gold for the sole purpose of overcharging your other gifts.

upgrades.name: Sealed
upgrades.description: You can survive in hard vacuum and other outlandish environments. You no longer need to eat. If you do ingest poison somehow, it doesn't affect you.

upgrades.name: Jetpack
upgrades.description: You can fly at the speed of the fastest airborne creature in the world. Each time you take this, your speed doubles.
